---
title: 'Declaration!'
date: '2014-10-26T05:39:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7429175106454602427'
blogger_filename: '/2014/10/declaration.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

I'm going to write a novel and publish it.
